Class ReturnType<C>

java.lang.Object
com.blackrook.redis.enums.ReturnType<C>
Type Parameters:
C - the type to parse.
public class ReturnType<C> extends Object
Enumeration of Redis return types, used for figuring out what to return sometimes. Necessary for pipelining commands.
Author:
Matthew Tropiano
